---
name: Multimodal review
about: Propose safe OCR, image matching, or reviewer-assist work
title: "[Multimodal] "
labels: ["multimodal", "review", "policy"]
assignees: ""
---

## Reviewer Assistance Goal

What should AI or image processing help a human reviewer understand?

## Technique

- [ ] OCR / visual text extraction
- [ ] exact image hash
- [ ] perceptual hash
- [ ] image quality check
- [ ] other reviewer-assist signal

## Explicitly Out Of Scope

- [ ] no autonomous identity decision
- [ ] no raw image export
- [ ] no face recognition without separate approval
- [ ] no biometric embedding without separate approval

## Data Handling

What synthetic or approved dataset will be used?

## Audit And Policy

What policy decision, model version, prompt/output redaction, and audit events
are required?
